payload.answer: Committed two project-state memory cards: Slack as primary guardrailed ingestion; Telegram as a later option.
payload.decision: Commit: Slack is the primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface; Telegram may be added later.

entity_resolution.reason: Entities are used at a generic level (Slack/Telegram/Brain) without an existing identifier context.

payload.intent: Update Brain project-state memory about primary ingestion interface and future alternatives.

memory_cards.statement: Slack should be the primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface for the Brain system.
Telegram can come later as a memory ingestion interface (not primary at this time).

details: Slack primary guardrailed ingestion interface stored.
Telegram categorized as later, non-primary stored.

repair_options: If a future update introduces Telegram as primary or confirms a timeline, add a new card with those specifics.
If Slack is replaced or de-scoped, add a corrective card describing the change and its effective date.
